# Academic Research MCP

Search 600M+ academic papers, grants, and citations for AI agents doing literature review and due diligence.

## When to call

Use this MCP when you need to:
- Find papers on a specific topic ranked by citations
- Get paper details by DOI (abstract, authors, funding)
- Trace citations forward to find follow-on research
- Find NIH/NSF grants for a research topic
- Profile a researcher or institution's research output
- Analyze research trends over time
- Conduct a systematic literature review

## Tools

| Tool | Price | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| search_papers | $0.02 | Search CrossRef, OpenAlex, Semantic Scholar, PubMed for papers on a topic |
| get_paper_details | $0.01 | Get full metadata for a paper by DOI including abstract and funders |
| find_citations | $0.02 | Find all papers that cite a specific paper (forward citations) |
| find_grants | $0.03 | Search NIH, NSF, and foundation grants by topic |
| author_research_profile | $0.03 | Get h-index, top papers, and affiliations for a researcher |
| institution_research_profile | $0.05 | Get h-index, paper counts, and top topics for a university |
| research_trends | $0.05 | Analyze publication volume and citation patterns over time |
| systematic_review | $0.10 | Comprehensive literature review across all databases, deduplicated |

## Example AI Prompt

"Find recent papers on transformer attention mechanisms for time series forecasting from 2020 onwards, show top 10 by citations."

## Example AI Prompt

"Do a systematic review of mRNA vaccine research from 2020-2025, show top 50 papers ranked by citations across all databases."

---

## MCP Server Details

**Endpoint:** `https://academic-research-mcp.apify.actor/mcp`
**Apify Store:** https://apify.com/xJbDa0jVpat4rNTan

## Quick Start

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "academic-research-mcp": {
      "url": "https://academic-research-mcp.apify.actor/mcp?token=YOUR_APIFY_TOKEN"
    }
  }
}
```

No API key required for public data. AI agents can call tools directly via the MCP protocol.

## Data Sources

| Source | Records |
|--------|---------|
| CrossRef | 150M papers |
| OpenAlex | 250M papers |
| NIH RePORTER | 900K grants |
| NSF Award API | 200K grants |

## SEO Keywords

academic research MCP, literature review automation, paper search API, CrossRef alternative, Semantic Scholar API, NIH grants lookup, NSF award search, citation analysis, systematic review, no API key needed, AI agent research, LLM research tools, Claude academic search, Cursor research assistant, due diligence research
